panels.title: Holo Events
panels.infobox: 💬 Track which events you've seen. ⚠ Note the special Luka CG event in the Luka panel — you must choose the *wrong* answer for 100% CG completion.

entry_Event.name: After meeting Norah — Holo teases Lawrence
"That's not like you." Holo notices you're off
"Surrounded by such a sweet, sweet smell..." Holo smells the forest
entry_Event.answer: You can eat the damaged ones.

entry_Event.name: "You can pin these stories down to this." Trade talk
entry_Event.answer: Explain how the Amber Guide works.

entry_Event.name: Rainy. "Ngh..." Holo is cold
entry_Event.answer: I'll build a fire, whatever it takes.

entry_Event.name: Holo has trouble falling asleep. "Yes, I'll do that."
"What am I supposed to do with a fierce wolf who'd show her sleeping face?"
"Well, do you know how wolves like me cross a big river?"
entry_Event.answer: You borrow wisdom from other beasts?

entry_Event.name: Pickles. "Ngh."
"Not to mention, lightning is the cause of forest fires." (move closer)
"What say we copy them?"
"Not to mention, lightning..." (laugh it off)
"I've heard those footsteps before"
Grape Festival
"If we don't leave this morning..."
Fortune teller at daytime
Fortune teller at nighttime
entry_Event.answer: Can you recommend a good restaurant?

entry_Event.name: Bird's nest found
entry_Event.answer: Put it back in a tree

entry_Event.name: "Naturally, a male should be sensitive to this smell."
"I only just gave them to you!"
"I'm happy that you want to take care of me, but..."
"Fighting isn't my strong suit..."
"Ugh... I can't give up."
"Will you let them buy the rings?"
"It really does look tasty..."
"Heh heh, you'll see when we get there!"
"This feminine human form is temporary..." — Holo jokes about being male
entry_Event.answer: A male Holo is still Holo

entry_Event.name: Top hat guy "What should I do...?"
"Why did you suddenly bring it up?"
entry_Event.answer: I just thought it was beautiful.

entry_Event.name: "Holo..."
"'Tis settled, then! We shall spend the night at the inn, yes?"
"If you'd like, I'll even feed you."

panels.title: Luka Events
panels.infobox: ⚠️ Events|49 — the meat-carving event — requires choosing the *wrong* answer intentionally to unlock a CG. The answer column shows the correct CG choice.

entry_Event.name: Residence in Beorein — pack her stuff
"We can't just leave her."
"I'll catch it! You wait here!"
"Wha? Piggyback?!"
"We're not getting anywhere like this."
"Since we're here, let's go take a look!"
"The current's not too strong either."
"I wonder what it could be...? It sounds fun!"
"I made them. Sorry..."
"Ehehe, did I scare you?"
"If you get there... What are you gonna do after?"
"It's just... I suddenly started thinking about home..."
entry_Event.answer: You'll feel better if you eat.

entry_Event.name: "You will not! This is my seat!"
"Mitzfing Temple silver!"
"It's fine, so you don't have to worry about me."
"Come on, over here! There's an orange stall!"
"Hmm... It's a bit pricey, but..."
"But mister, how are we supposed to eat a piece of meat this big?"
entry_Event.answer: ⚠️ Choose WRONG option for CG: 'I'll show you how to carve it.'
entry_Event.note: Intentional failure — required for 100% CG. Save before this event.

entry_Event.name: Top hat. "Please, think of doing it as a great favor...!"
"If you'd like, we could feed you."
"Yeah, and a small one at that."
entry_Event.answer: We'll make it work. / I'll sleep on the floor.

entry_Event.name: Ordering food. "What?!"
(First travel to Diemoln) Norah offers to protect from wolves
"Hindsight is of little use now."
"I know a story that's a little scary..."
"Tee-hee. That is a large flock, though."
"Carts are wonderful, aren't they?"
entry_Event.answer: Do you like riding in the cart?

entry_Event.name: "Yes, since we're near a forest, I thought I might find something."
"Huh?!"
"I wonder what it could be to make Miss Holo so excited..."
"When I thought about that, a sudden wave of loneliness swept over me."
"...Mr. Lawrence. This rain has reminded me..."
"So sometimes I just let him do what he wants..."
"I could give you a shoulder massage, if you'd like."
"You like it, huh? Tee-hee..."
"I'm sure it's fine. She'll be here soon, no?"
"I wonder... I think it might be too narrow to get through."
"I-I think I accidentally dropped my purse."
entry_Event.answer: Didn't you leave it in the cart?

entry_Event.name: "But they are lovely..."
"Right..."
"...Oh? Is something wrong, Mr. Lawrence?"
entry_Event.answer: I'm glad you're enjoying yourself. / Would you like to try it on?

entry_Event.name: Top hat. "What should I do, Mr. Lawrence?"
"If you'd like, we could even feed you."
(Talk to Barmaid in Diemoln) Trade dominated by one party
"You shouldn't push yourself."
See a tower
"It's cold out, so you should at least take this."
Fish stew. "I think the flavor makes up for it."
"An antidote for all"
"You've got good taste as well as being a gourmet."
Late, find an inn. "I don't see why not. I'm all for it."
Girl selling flowers
"Silver coins? What are you doing?"
"(She's asleep at the desk.)"
"Why don't we find somewhere to take shelter from the rain a bit?"
"And the price is attractive, too."
"Mnnnnn..." Holo sleeping
"I cannot wait any longer. I might faint from the hunger."
Top hat guy "What do you think?"
